## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://stayforlong.com/?market=es&lang=es
2. Close exclusive offers popup
3. Scroll down the page
4. Click email input field
5. Click Subscribe button
6. Enter email 'hilda.escalona@stayforlong.com'
7. Click Subscribe button
8. Verify thank you message displays
